title: Traveler's Tinctures for Gastroenteritis: 7 Herbal Remedies
description: Ginkgo biloba tinctures may help with gastroenteritis due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The constituents, including flavonoids and terpenoids, help to soothe the digestive system and reduce inflammation in the gut. Ginkgo biloba tinctures may also improve blood flow to the digestive system, which can help to reduce the severity of symptoms such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea.
